title: SHIELD-VIO: Estimator Introspection, Calibrated Failure Prediction, and Protective Navigation for Visual-Inertial Autonomy
description: Open-source research toolkit for estimator introspection, calibrated visual-inertial failure prediction, domain-shift awareness, and supervisory navigation shielding. The current release provides research prototypes and deterministic synthetic validation; it does not claim production-quality VIO, real-world calibration, hardware safety, state-of-the-art performance, or formal guarantees.
notes: Synthetic validation and adapter tests must not be represented as public-dataset, simulator, hardware, production, or formal-safety evidence.
